heading: Return of arms and equipment upon relief from Federal service
label: 706 Return of arms and equipment upon relief from Federal service
text: So far as practicable, whenever units, organizations, or members of the National Guard are returned to their National Guard status under section 325(b) of this title, arms and equipment that the Secretary concerned determines are sufficient to accomplish their peacetime mission shall be returned with them.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70650:1122(b) (last 17 words.)(last 17 words), .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 712(b)66 Stat. 504The words “So far as practicable” are inserted, since sufficient arms and equipment might not be available.
